name: Mixed Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except lettuce leaves in a large bowl.
2. Gently toss the mixture to coat evenly.
3. Chill for 1 to 2 hours.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves, if desired.
Yield: 16 servings (approximately 1/4 cup each). Each serving may be exchanged for 1 Fruit.
